subcodes.first_line: O thou who art graced with the understanding of the Most Merciful! Today, attainment unto supreme guidance is among the greatest bounties of the Almighty Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فائز بعرفان حضرت رحمن الیوم فوز بهدایت کبری از اعظم مواهب حضرت کبریاست و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @knowledge; recognition of God
